parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "laboratory coordinator" as LC
participant ":LabCoordinatorUI" as UI
participant ":ValidateTestReportController" as CTRL
participant ":Company" as COMP
participant "rp : TestStore" as TS
participant "rp : Test" as T
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TRS
participant "rp : TestReport" as TR
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as TD

activate LC
LC -> UI : 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis
activate UI
UI -> CTRL : 2 createTestList()
activate CTRL
CTRL -> COMP : 3 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate COMP
COMP -> TS : 4 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TS
TS -> T : 5 get = getTestList()
deactivate TS
COMP -> TRS : 6 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TRS
TRS -> TR : 7 get = getTestReportList()
activate TR
TR -> TD : 8 get = getTestDiagnosis()
deactivate TR
deactivate TRS
deactivate COMP

ref over UI, CTRL
  US15_SD_testReportsDTO.puml
end ref

CTRL --> UI : 9
deactivate CTRL
UI --> LC : 10 shows the available test reports and diagnosis and requests selection
deactivate UI

LC -> UI : 11 chooses all tests
activate UI
UI --> LC : 12 asks for confirmation
deactivate UI

LC -> UI : 13 confirms selection
activate UI
UI -> CTRL : 14 validateAllTestReport()
activate CTRL

loop
  CTRL -> TS : 15 validateTestReport(testId);
  activate TS
  TS -> T : 16 setState(VALIDATED);
  deactivate TS
  CTRL -> TS : 17 registerValidationDate(date);
  activate TS
  TS -> T : 18 setValidationDate(date);
  deactivate TS
end

UI --> LC : 19 informs operation success
deactivate CTRL
deactivate UI
deactivate LC

@enduml
```
